approved_for: native audit append to core audit chain
native baseline and severity integration testing
explicit local native export package testing
CI enforcement for artifact and test checks
known_limitations: Native permission/status code is platform-scaffolded and requires device execution for final platform assurance.
Provider delivery remains behind guarded adapter boundaries and local persistence only in this package.
Secure key hardware guarantees remain platform-capability dependent.
next_release_requirements: execute native tests on physical iOS and Android devices
persist native signing keys through real Keychain and Keystore paths
connect native runner to controlled live provider sandbox
